'''鈭歳-y-ch''' ('''karayach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pemmicanize|pemmicanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pemmicanize|pemmicanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-y-ch
|-
! Lemma
| karayach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirayach|thirayach]] || [[word:jirayach|jirayach]] || [[word:shirayach|shirayach]] || [[word:kirayach|kirayach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurayach|thuthurayach]] || [[word:jujurayach|jujurayach]] || [[word:shushurayach|shushurayach]] || [[word:kukurayach|kukurayach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurayach|thurayach]] || [[word:jurayach|jurayach]] || [[word:shurayach|shurayach]] || [[word:kurayach|kurayach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurayach|thurayach]] || [[word:jurayach|jurayach]] || [[word:shurayach|shurayach]] || [[word:kurayach|kurayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therayach|therayach]] || [[word:jerayach|jerayach]] || [[word:sherayach|sherayach]] || [[word:kerayach|kerayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorayach|thothorayach]] || [[word:jojorayach|jojorayach]] || [[word:shoshorayach|shoshorayach]] || [[word:kokorayach|kokorayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorayach|thorayach]] || [[word:jorayach|jorayach]] || [[word:shorayach|shorayach]] || [[word:korayach|korayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorayach|thorayach]] || [[word:jorayach|jorayach]] || [[word:shorayach|shorayach]] || [[word:korayach|korayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]] || [[word:rayach|rayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rayach|th忙rayach]] || [[word:j忙rayach|j忙rayach]] || [[word:sh忙rayach|sh忙rayach]] || [[word:k忙rayach|k忙rayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharayach|thatharayach]] || [[word:jajarayach|jajarayach]] || [[word:shasharayach|shasharayach]] || [[word:kakarayach|kakarayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharayach|tharayach]] || [[word:jarayach|jarayach]] || [[word:sharayach|sharayach]] || [[word:karayach|karayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharayach|tharayach]] || [[word:jarayach|jarayach]] || [[word:sharayach|sharayach]] || [[word:karayach|karayach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharayach|sharayach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharayach|gosharayach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharayach|gokisharayach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharayachn眉|sharayachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharayachnkn眉|gosharayachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayachn眉|gokisharayachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharayachsh毛|sharayachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharayachnksh毛|gosharayachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharayachsh毛|gokisharayachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayachro|sharayachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayachnkro|gosharayachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayachro|gokisharayachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayachmu|sharayachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayachnkmu|gosharayachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayachmu|gokisharayachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharayachsher|sharayachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharayachnksher|gosharayachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharayachsher|gokisharayachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharayachng|sharayachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharayachnkng|gosharayachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharayachng|gokisharayachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharayachya|sharayachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharayachnkya|gosharayachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharayachya|gokisharayachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharayachyam|sharayachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharayachnkyam|gosharayachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharayachyam|gokisharayachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayachn眉sh毛|sharayachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayachnkn眉sh毛|gosharayachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayachn眉sh毛|gokisharayachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayachn眉ro|sharayachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayachnkn眉ro|gosharayachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayachn眉ro|gokisharayachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayachn眉mu|sharayachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayachnkn眉mu|gosharayachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayachn眉mu|gokisharayachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayachsh毛n眉|sharayachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayachnksh毛n眉|gosharayachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayachsh毛n眉|gokisharayachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayachsh毛ro|sharayachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayachnksh毛ro|gosharayachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayachsh毛ro|gokisharayachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayachsh毛mu|sharayachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayachnksh毛mu|gosharayachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayachsh毛mu|gokisharayachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayachron眉|sharayachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayachnkron眉|gosharayachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayachron眉|gokisharayachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayachrosh毛|sharayachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayachnkrosh毛|gosharayachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayachrosh毛|gokisharayachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayachromu|sharayachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayachnkromu|gosharayachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayachromu|gokisharayachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayachmun眉|sharayachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayachnkmun眉|gosharayachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayachmun眉|gokisharayachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayachmush毛|sharayachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayachnkmush毛|gosharayachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayachmush毛|gokisharayachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayachmuro|sharayachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayachnkmuro|gosharayachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayachmuro|gokisharayachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
